_README: Per-task arm-motion configuration for run_scene.py.
WHERE the arm goes comes entirely from each task's scene-context .md (the
waypoints); the robot simply follows those waypoint positions in order.
This file sets the EXECUTION POLICY around those waypoints. Tasks fall back
to '_default' for anything unset.
_inherit_defaults : set false only when the task explicitly defines every
active value and must be isolated from shared-default changes.
MOVED to task_data/physics/<task>.json (so each physics file fully describes the
task it drives): 'planner', 'waypoint_steps', and the 'gripper' block
(open / closed / static_friction / dynamic_friction). run_scene overlays those
onto this config at load, so they behave exactly as before - just authored there:
planner : default planner when --planner is omitted (diffik/rmpflow/curobo/rrt).
rrt_safety_margin : (rrt planner) default obstacle clearance (m) when --rrt-safety-margin is
omitted; falls back to 0.05. Set 0.0 to disable the margin for this task.
waypoint_steps : { waypoint-name: sim steps to spend reaching it } (more = slower/smoother).
gripper.open / gripper.closed : per-finger fully-open / close targets (m). 0.04 is the
Franka finger limit; lower 'closed' closes more (smaller objects).
gripper.static_friction / gripper.dynamic_friction : Coulomb friction for the finger colliders.
Fields that STAY here:
gripper_squeeze_m : for geometry-derived friction grasps, how far each finger
closes past the measured handle half-width. Larger = firmer grip.
geometry_friction_grasp : derive close width from grasped geometry and apply squeeze.
carry_lift_m / slide_along_rod_m : optional task-specific carry path adjustments.
post_release_settle_steps : extra physics steps after release in diagnostic runs.
gripper_per_waypoint / follow_path_orientation / match_graspable_to_report : per-task motion tweaks.
press_button : live button-press phase config (object / press_waypoint / approach / depth / steps).
release_at_waypoint : name of the waypoint where the gripper OPENS (releases the
object). Default = the last waypoint. Set it earlier to place the
object and then retreat with the gripper already open (e.g. open on
the scale tray at 'waypoint4', then move up to 'waypoint5').
pick_place_sequence : true for MULTI-pick tasks (N objects -> a stack/pyramid). The gripper
CLOSES at each waypoint whose parent is a graspable (dynamic) body and OPENS
at each waypoint whose parent is a placement target, so every object is
picked and placed in turn - instead of grasping one object and dragging it
through the rest of the trajectory (which rams the other objects -> unstable).
carry_clearance_m : (pick_place_sequence only) extra height (m) added to the transit/lift
waypoints WHILE carrying, so the held object clears the other objects and the
growing stack instead of grazing them (grazing jams the arm -> diffIK blow-up).
Joint physics also comes from task_data/physics/<task>.json (the 'joints' block).
